mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_draft ( member_id, review_draft_title, review_draft_content, review_draft_saved_at, review_draft_related ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{reviewDraftTitle}, #{reviewDraftContent}, NOW(), #{reviewDraftRelated} )
mapper.update: UPDATE review_draft SET review_draft_title = #{reviewDraftTitle}, review_draft_content = #{reviewDraftContent}, review_draft_related = #{reviewDraftRelated}, review_draft_saved_at = NOW() WHERE review_draft_id = #{reviewDraftId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT review_draft_id AS reviewDraftId, member_id AS memberId, review_draft_title AS reviewDraftTitle, review_draft_content AS reviewDraftContent, review_draft_saved_at AS reviewDraftSavedAt, review_draft_related AS reviewDraftRelated FROM review_draft WHERE review_draft_id = #{reviewDraftId}

SELECT review_draft_id AS reviewDraftId, member_id AS memberId, review_draft_title AS reviewDraftTitle, review_draft_content AS reviewDraftContent, review_draft_saved_at AS reviewDraftSavedAt, review_draft_related AS reviewDraftRelated FROM review_draft WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY review_draft_saved_at DESC
